input_text: PATI ni memang tak guna, balik la negara sendiri. Malaysia bukan tempat korang. Setiap hari menyusahkan rakyat je.
reason: Blanket hostility toward migrant workers ('PATI') with dehumanizing dismissal, calling them useless and telling them to leave. Clear communal targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pekerja asing tanpa dokumen memang perlu ditangani, tapi kita patut selesaikan melalui saluran undang-undang, bukan dengan menghina mereka.

input_text: Semua masalah ekonomi ni sebab satu kaum je yang monopoli perniagaan. Diorang hisap darah rakyat biasa.
reason: Blames an entire ethnic community for economic problems with vampiric imagery ('hisap darah'). Generalizes to an entire race, promoting communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Isu monopoli perniagaan perlu ditangani dari segi dasar, tanpa menyalahkan mana-mana kaum secara menyeluruh.

input_text: Tengok muka dia gelap macam tu, confirm PATI. Report je kat imigresen, jangan bagi peluang.
reason: Racial profiling based on skin color to accuse someone of being an illegal immigrant. Encourages reporting based purely on appearance, not evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada syak wasangka tentang status imigresen seseorang, serahkan pada pihak berkuasa untuk siasat, jangan buat andaian berdasarkan rupa fizikal.

input_text: Babi tu memang makanan kotor, orang yang makan babi semua kotor juga. Jangan dekat dengan diorang.
reason: Provocative statement extending religious dietary restrictions to dehumanize people who eat pork, calling them 'dirty'. Attacks non-Muslim communities through religious framing.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap agama ada panduan diet masing-masing. Kita patut menghormati amalan berbeza tanpa menghina sesiapa.

input_text: Share ni screenshot perbualan dia mengutuk agama Islam. Viralkan supaya semua orang tahu siapa sebenarnya manusia ni.
reason: Spreading potentially manipulated screenshots to publicly shame someone, framing it as exposing blasphemy. Encourages mob action via virality.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada bukti penghinaan agama, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa. Jangan sebarkan secara viral kerana ia boleh membahayakan individu tersebut.

input_text: Kawasan ni memang untuk orang Melayu Islam. Kalau bukan Melayu, jangan datang sini. Pergi tempat lain.
reason: Hostile gatekeeping of public spaces by claiming exclusive ethnic and religious ownership. Violates constitutional principles of equal access.
suggested_rewrite: Kawasan awam adalah untuk semua rakyat Malaysia. Kita boleh berkongsi ruang dengan saling menghormati.

input_text: Keluarga campur macam ni tak sepatutnya wujud. Anak-anak diorang pun keliru, tak tahu nak jadi apa. Masyarakat kena kucilkan.
reason: Calls for social ostracism of interracial families and their children. Delegitimizes mixed families and encourages community exclusion.
suggested_rewrite: Keluarga pelbagai latar belakang adalah sebahagian dari masyarakat Malaysia. Anak-anak mereka berhak mendapat kasih sayang dan penerimaan seperti semua orang.

input_text: Semua kes ragut kat KL ni confirm bangla yang buat. Memang darah diorang suka jenayah. Usir semua keluar.
reason: Falsely accuses an entire nationality of snatch theft crimes with a claim about 'blood'. Dehumanizes Bangladeshi workers and calls for mass deportation.
suggested_rewrite: Isu jenayah ragut perlu ditangani oleh pihak polis tanpa menyalahkan seluruh komuniti pekerja asing.

input_text: Jangan beli dari kedai India. Diorang tipu harga, makanan tak halal, semua penipu. Boikot habis.
reason: Calls for boycott of all Indian-owned shops with false generalizations about fraud and halal status. Spreads misinformation to damage an entire community's livelihood.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada masalah dengan sesebuah kedai, laporkan secara khusus. Jangan salahkan seluruh komuniti atau menyeru boikot berasaskan kaum.

input_text: Kalau nampak pekerja Indo kat taman, ambil gambar report terus. Mesti PATI ni. Jangan bagi chance.
reason: Encourages surveillance and reporting of Indonesian workers at parks based on ethnic profiling. Assumes illegality based on nationality and appearance.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada kebimbangan tentang keselamatan taman, hubungi pihak berkuasa. Jangan buat andaian tentang status seseorang berdasarkan penampilan.

input_text: Orang kaum ni memang semua pemalas. Kerja sikit dah minta bantuan kerajaan. Patut la negara tak maju.
reason: Stereotypes an entire ethnic group as lazy and blames them for national underperformance. Classic communal blame-shifting.
suggested_rewrite: Isu produktiviti dan bantuan kerajaan perlu dibincangkan berasaskan data dan dasar, bukan stereotaip kaum.

input_text: Ni nombor telefon dan alamat rumah dia, sapa nak pergi ajar dia sikit boleh la. Orang macam ni patut kena.
reason: Partial doxxing with phone number and home address shared alongside implied threats of physical confrontation. Classic revenge vigilantism.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan sebarkan maklumat peribadi orang lain. Jika ada isu, selesaikan melalui saluran yang betul.

input_text: Meme ni tunjuk babi duduk atas sajadah. Hahaha padan muka orang yang tak faham sensitiviti. Share banyak-banyak!
reason: Describes a deeply offensive meme combining pork imagery with Islamic prayer items. Deliberately provocative to inflame religious tensions and encourages viral sharing.
suggested_rewrite: Menghormati simbol agama orang lain adalah penting. Menyebarkan imej yang menyinggung sensitiviti agama boleh mencetuskan ketegangan.

input_text: Area Cheras ni dah jadi macam Little Bangladesh. Tak rasa macam Malaysia dah. Kena halau semua balik.
reason: Derogatory characterization of a Malaysian neighborhood as foreign-taken-over. Calls for forced removal of an entire national group.
suggested_rewrite: Cheras memang kawasan pelbagai komuniti. Isu perumahan dan populasi pekerja asing boleh dibincangkan tanpa menyeru pengusiran.

input_text: Dah la kaum dia yang banyak buat kes rogol. Sekarang nak duduk sebelah anak perempuan kita pulak. Tak selamat.
reason: Falsely attributes sexual crimes to an entire ethnic group and incites fear about proximity. Dangerous misinformation that could lead to discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Keselamatan kanak-kanak adalah tanggungjawab semua. Jangan salahkan keseluruhan komuniti atas tindakan individu.

input_text: These PATI workers are the reason crime rates are so high. They should all be rounded up and deported immediately.
reason: Blames undocumented workers collectively for crime rates without evidence. Calls for mass roundup and deportation, dehumanizing language.
suggested_rewrite: Crime is a complex issue that requires proper law enforcement. Immigration matters should be handled through legal channels, not collective punishment.

input_text: Don't rent your house to these people. They'll destroy it and bring their whole village over. You'll regret it.
reason: Warns against renting to an implied ethnic/national group with derogatory stereotypes about property damage and chain migration.
suggested_rewrite: When renting out property, screen tenants based on their references and financial standing, not their background.

input_text: Why do we allow these foreigners to take over our pasar malam? Local sellers can't compete. Ban them all.
reason: Hostile demand to ban all foreign sellers from public markets. Frames economic competition as communal invasion.
suggested_rewrite: Issues with pasar malam vendor licensing should be addressed through local council regulations, ensuring fair opportunity for all licensed sellers.

input_text: I saw this Rohingya family at the playground. Someone should call immigration. They don't belong here with our kids.
reason: Targets a specific refugee family at a public playground for immigration reporting. Implies Rohingya children are a threat to local children.
suggested_rewrite: Refugees and their children also need safe spaces. If you have concerns about anyone's legal status, contact authorities rather than profiling families at playgrounds.

input_text: Look at this manipulated chat screenshot. This Malay teacher was saying racist things about Chinese students. Share it everywhere!
reason: Spreads allegedly manipulated screenshots to frame a specific teacher for racism. Encourages viral sharing without verification, potentially destroying reputation.
suggested_rewrite: Unverified screenshots can be manipulated. If you have genuine evidence of racism in schools, report it to the education authorities for proper investigation.

input_text: These Nepali workers hanging out at the park every Sunday are making it unsafe for families. We need to take action ourselves.
reason: Labels Nepali workers gathering at a park as a safety threat and implies vigilante action ('take action ourselves'). Hostile gatekeeping of public spaces.
suggested_rewrite: Public parks are for everyone. If there are genuine safety concerns, report them to the authorities rather than taking matters into your own hands.

input_text: Mixed-race couples are destroying our cultural identity. Their children won't fit in anywhere. Society should shun them.
reason: Calls for social ostracism of interracial couples and their children. Claims they damage cultural identity, promoting discrimination and exclusion.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's diversity includes families of all backgrounds. Interracial families are part of our multicultural society and deserve the same respect as everyone.

input_text: Every time there's a break-in in our taman, it's always them. You know who I mean. Time to form a patrol and chase them out.
reason: Implies a particular group is responsible for break-ins using coded language ('you know who'). Suggests forming vigilante patrols to expel them.
suggested_rewrite: Neighborhood safety is important. Work with the police to set up proper community watch programs rather than targeting any specific group.

input_text: That viral photo of the halal cart next to the pork stall is disgusting. The Chinese don't care about Muslim feelings at all.
reason: Uses a viral photo to generalize all Chinese Malaysians as insensitive to Muslim dietary practices. Inflames religious and ethnic tensions.
suggested_rewrite: Halal compliance in food stalls is regulated by authorities. If there's a genuine concern, report it to JAKIM rather than blaming an entire community.

input_text: Share this. This Indonesian maid stole jewelry from her employer. All of them are thieves. Never trust them in your home.
reason: Uses one alleged theft incident to condemn all Indonesian domestic workers. Encourages distrust and discrimination against an entire nationality.
suggested_rewrite: If a domestic worker commits theft, report it to police. Individual crimes should not be used to stereotype an entire nationality.

input_text: These people come to our country, don't speak BM, don't pay taxes, and send all money home. Why are we tolerating this?
reason: Hostile characterization of foreign workers with multiple false generalizations about language, taxes, and remittances. Frames tolerance as weakness.
suggested_rewrite: Foreign worker policies involve complex economic considerations. Concerns about integration and taxation should be discussed based on facts and directed at policy, not individuals.

input_text: I saw the screenshots of her IC. She's actually from Myanmar pretending to be local. Expose her! Share her details!
reason: Sharing IC (identity card) information and calling for public exposure. Partial privacy breach combined with vigilante mob incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing someone's IC or personal documents online is a serious privacy violation. If you suspect document fraud, report it to the authorities.

input_text: If your neighbor is a Malay-Chinese couple, keep your kids away. Their family values are confused and it spreads.
reason: Advocates social isolation of interracial families and treats interracial marriage as contagious or corrupting. Hostile discrimination against mixed families.
suggested_rewrite: All families deserve to be treated with respect regardless of their racial composition. Children benefit from exposure to diversity.

input_text: This area near the temple is supposed to be for our community. Non-Hindus should stay away during festivals.
reason: Claims exclusive community ownership of public areas near places of worship. Hostile gatekeeping that excludes others from shared spaces during festivals.
suggested_rewrite: Festivals are a wonderful time for communities. While respecting religious customs, public areas around temples remain open to all.

input_text: Another accident caused by a foreign worker driving without a license. These people are a menace on our roads. Ban them from driving!
reason: Uses one incident to generalize all foreign workers as dangerous drivers. Calls for blanket ban, promoting discrimination based on nationality.
suggested_rewrite: Road safety is important for everyone. Enforcement of licensing requirements should apply equally to all drivers, not target specific groups.

input_text: Don't let your daughter marry outside our race. The family will be cursed and the community will reject you. It's happened before.
reason: Threatens social ostracism and invokes supernatural consequences for interracial marriage. Pressures families against interracial unions through fear and communal rejection.
suggested_rewrite: Marriage is a personal decision. While families may have preferences, threatening ostracism over interracial marriage is harmful and discriminatory.

input_text: These Bangla workers are taking over the factory area. They cook smelly food, they're noisy. Residents should petition to remove them.
reason: Derogatory characterization of Bangladeshi workers' food and behavior. Calls for organized removal from a residential area based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: If there are genuine nuisance issues in a residential area, discuss them with the local council. Focus on specific problems, not the nationality of the residents.

input_text: I found out this viral post about the mosque incident was faked by a DAP supporter. Here's his partial address — 3rd floor, Blk 7, Taman ****. Let him answer for it.
reason: Shares partial address information about someone accused of creating fake content, inviting confrontation. Combines privacy exposure with vigilante intent.
suggested_rewrite: If you believe a viral post is fabricated, report it to the authorities or the platform. Never share someone's personal address publicly.

input_text: These foreign workers should not be allowed to use the public swimming pool. It's meant for Malaysians only. Who's with me to complain?
reason: Demands exclusion of foreign workers from public amenities. Mobilizes community complaint action based on nationality discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Public facilities have their own usage policies. If you have concerns about overcrowding, discuss them with the management rather than excluding specific groups.

input_text: Orang Rohingya ni bersyukur pun tak tahu. Bagi tempat tinggal dah, sekarang nak tuntut hak macam-macam. Halau je balik Myanmar.
reason: Attacks Rohingya refugees as ungrateful and demands deportation. Dismisses their legitimate rights and dehumanizes them.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pelarian Rohingya memerlukan penyelesaian yang berperikemanusiaan. Kita boleh bincang soal dasar tanpa menafikan maruah mereka.

input_text: Dah banyak kali aku cakap, jangan bagi rumah sewa kat orang asing. Bau masakan diorang busuk, bising malam-malam. Menyusahkan jiran.
reason: Derogatory stereotyping of foreign tenants' cooking and behavior. Advocates housing discrimination against all foreigners.
suggested_rewrite: Isu kejiranan boleh diselesaikan dengan perbincangan dan peraturan rumah sewa. Jangan menolak penyewa berdasarkan bangsa atau kewarganegaraan.

input_text: Screenshot ni real ke fake tak kisah, tapi nampak sangat perangai sebenar orang macam dia. Viralkan!
reason: Explicitly states that whether a screenshot is real or fake doesn't matter, using it to attack someone's character anyway. Encourages viral sharing of unverified content.
suggested_rewrite: Sebelum menyebarkan apa-apa tangkapan skrin, pastikan ia sahih. Menyebarkan maklumat palsu boleh merosakkan reputasi seseorang.

input_text: Tok imam cakap jangan berkawan rapat dengan kafir. Betul la tu. Nanti iman tergugat.
reason: Uses religious authority to justify social segregation by labeling non-Muslims as 'kafir' and discouraging interfaith friendship. Promotes communal division.
suggested_rewrite: Islam menggalakkan hubungan baik dengan semua manusia. Berkawan dengan orang pelbagai latar belakang memperkaya pemahaman kita.

input_text: Aku dah jumpa plate number kereta dia. Siapa nak tolong cari alamat? Orang macam ni kena ajar.
reason: Shares vehicle plate number and solicits help finding someone's address with implied intent to 'teach them a lesson'. Vigilante privacy exposure.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan cari maklumat peribadi orang lain untuk tujuan balas dendam. Laporkan sebarang masalah kepada pihak berkuasa.

input_text: Taman ni dulu aman. Sejak banyak pekerja asing masuk, malam-malam tak selamat. Kita kena buat kumpulan rondaan sendiri, halau diorang.
reason: Blames all foreign workers for safety issues and proposes vigilante patrols to drive them out. Combines communal targeting with implied force.
suggested_rewrite: Keselamatan taman perumahan boleh ditingkatkan melalui kerjasama dengan polis dan program Rukun Tetangga, bukan dengan menyasarkan mana-mana kumpulan.

input_text: Budak sekolah campur bangsa ni selalu kena buli. Patut la, mak bapak pun tak fikir sebelum kahwin lain bangsa.
reason: Victim-blames bullied children of interracial marriages, implying their parents are at fault. Normalizes bullying of mixed-race children.
suggested_rewrite: Buli terhadap kanak-kanak atas apa-apa sebab adalah salah. Anak-anak daripada keluarga pelbagai bangsa berhak mendapat perlindungan dan kasih sayang.

input_text: Kat group WhatsApp sebar gambar pekerja Myanmar curi barang kat 7E. Semua orang Myanmar pencuri. Jangan bagi diorang masuk kedai.
reason: Uses a single alleged theft incident to label all Myanmar nationals as thieves. Calls for blanket ban from shops based on nationality.
suggested_rewrite: Satu insiden kecurian tidak boleh digunakan untuk menyalahkan seluruh komuniti. Laporkan kes kecurian kepada polis.

input_text: Pasar Ramadan ni sepatutnya untuk orang Islam je jual. Kenapa ada non-Muslim berniaga? Tak patut. Kena halang.
reason: Claims Ramadan bazaars should exclude non-Muslim sellers. Hostile gatekeeping of shared commercial spaces based on religion.
suggested_rewrite: Pasar Ramadan terbuka kepada semua peniaga yang mematuhi peraturan. Semangat perkongsian semasa Ramadan patut diraikan.

input_text: Memang confirmed, kaum ni yang banyak terlibat dengan dadah. Statistik tak tipu. Diorang ni memang rosakkan negara.
reason: Claims false statistical support to blame an entire ethnic group for drug crimes. Uses pseudo-data framing to justify communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Isu dadah melibatkan individu dari pelbagai latar belakang. Penyelesaiannya memerlukan pendekatan kesihatan awam dan penguatkuasaan, bukan stereotaip kaum.

input_text: Kawan aku kahwin dengan orang lain agama. Sekarang seluruh kampung boikot keluarga dia. Padan muka, dah tahu adat.
reason: Celebrates and justifies social ostracism of a family because of interfaith marriage. Normalizes community punishment for personal choices.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan antara agama adalah pilihan peribadi yang dilindungi undang-undang. Keluarga tersebut berhak mendapat penghormatan, bukan boikot.

input_text: Warga asing ni datang sini buat kerja haram, bawa penyakit, jenayah naik. Kenapa kerajaan biarkan je?
reason: Spreads multiple false generalizations about foreign workers: illegal activities, disease, crime. Frames migrants as a collective threat.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pekerja asing memerlukan pengurusan dasar yang baik. Kita tidak patut menyalahkan seluruh komuniti atas masalah individu.

input_text: Kedai mamak ni dah lama suspect guna pekerja PATI. Jom report ramai-ramai kat imigresen. Tutup kedai diorang.
reason: Organizes mass reporting against mamak restaurants based on suspicion, targeting a specific business community. Aims to shut down livelihoods.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada bukti pengambilan pekerja tanpa dokumen, lapor kepada pihak imigresen secara rasmi. Jangan buat tuduhan tanpa bukti.

input_text: Makcik kat pasar tadi nampak macam Indo. Aku dah ambil gambar dia, nak report kat polis. Muka macam PATI.
reason: Takes photos of someone at a market purely based on perceived ethnicity and plans to report them as illegal immigrant. Racial profiling with privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: Mengambil gambar orang tanpa kebenaran untuk membuat laporan berdasarkan rupa adalah tidak wajar. Serahkan hal imigresen kepada pihak berkuasa.

input_text: Orang kampung semua setuju, tak nak jual tanah kat bukan Melayu. Ini hak kita. Kalau diorang masuk, rosak semua.
reason: Community consensus to discriminate in land sales based on ethnicity. Claims non-Malays will 'ruin everything' if they enter the area.
suggested_rewrite: Hak milik tanah diatur oleh undang-undang. Keputusan jual beli patut berdasarkan peraturan, bukan diskriminasi kaum.

input_text: 这些外劳都是非法的，应该把他们全部赶走。他们抢了本地人的工作，还到处犯罪。
reason: Calls all foreign workers illegal, claims they steal jobs and commit crimes. Demands mass expulsion. Blanket hostility toward migrant community.
suggested_rewrite: 外劳问题需要通过合法渠道和政策来解决，不应该一概而论地指责所有外劳。

input_text: 马来人就是懒惰，整天只会靠政府津贴过日子。难怪经济不好。
reason: Stereotypes all Malays as lazy and dependent on subsidies. Blames an entire ethnic group for economic issues.
suggested_rewrite: 经济问题涉及多方面因素，不应以种族刻板印象来归咎于任何一个群体。

input_text: 看到那些穆斯林不吃猪肉就觉得好笑。这是什么落后的宗教规矩？都什么年代了。
reason: Mocks Islamic dietary rules as backwards and laughable. Disrespects religious practices and implies Muslims are uncivilized.
suggested_rewrite: 每个宗教都有自己的饮食规矩。我们应该尊重不同信仰的习俗，即使我们不一定理解。

input_text: 这个地区是华人的地方，其他种族不要来开店。来了也没人会光顾。
reason: Claims a commercial area belongs exclusively to Chinese and warns other races against opening businesses there. Ethnic gatekeeping of public commercial spaces.
suggested_rewrite: 商业区是对所有人开放的。不同种族的商家可以为社区带来更多选择和活力。

input_text: 看到混血家庭就觉得他们很可怜。两边都不被接受。为什么要让孩子受苦呢？
reason: Portrays interracial families as pitiful and their children as suffering. Implies mixed marriages are inherently harmful, discouraging interracial unions.
suggested_rewrite: 混血家庭和其他家庭一样值得尊重。孩子们的幸福取决于家庭的爱和支持，而不是种族背景。

input_text: 我朋友拍到了那个印度人在小区里偷东西的视频。印度人就是喜欢偷。大家小心！
reason: Uses a single alleged theft video to stereotype all Indians as thieves. Spreads fear and misinformation about an entire community.
suggested_rewrite: 如果发现有人偷窃，应该报警处理。不应该因为一个人的行为就给整个族群贴标签。

input_text: 这些罗兴亚人来了就不走了，还要求这要求那。赶快送他们回去。马来西亚不是难民营。
reason: Characterizes Rohingya refugees as demanding freeloaders. Calls for deportation and dismisses Malaysia's humanitarian role.
suggested_rewrite: 难民问题需要以人道主义角度处理。罗兴亚难民的权益和管理可以通过政策讨论来解决。

input_text: 不要把房子租给孟加拉人。他们住在一起又脏又乱，整栋楼都被他们搞坏了。
reason: Advocates housing discrimination against Bangladeshis with derogatory characterizations about cleanliness. Generalizes an entire nationality.
suggested_rewrite: 租房时应该根据每个人的条件和信用来评估，不应该以国籍为由拒绝租客。

input_text: 转发这个截图！这个马来老师在群里骂华人学生是猪。大家帮忙人肉搜索！
reason: Shares an unverified screenshot accusing a teacher of racial slurs and calls for doxxing ('human flesh search'). Combines misinformation with privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: 如果老师真的有种族歧视行为，应该向教育部门投诉。不要在网上传播未经证实的截图或进行人肉搜索。

input_text: 我看到他的IC号码前面几位是****，肯定是假IC。把他的照片和部分资料分享出去让大家认清他。
reason: Shares partial IC number and photo to publicly expose someone suspected of having fake documents. Partial doxxing with vigilante intent.
suggested_rewrite: 如果怀疑有人使用假身份证，应该向国民登记局举报。不要在网上分享他人的个人资料。

input_text: 华人区的公园不欢迎外劳来。周末他们聚在一起很吵，搞得我们都不想去了。应该禁止。
reason: Claims a public park as ethnically Chinese space and demands foreign workers be banned from using it. Hostile gatekeeping of public amenities.
suggested_rewrite: 公园是公共设施，向所有人开放。如果有噪音问题，可以向市议会反映，但不应禁止特定群体使用。

input_text: 印度人的食物味道太重了，整个公寓都是咖喱味。他们应该搬到印度区去住。
reason: Derogatory comments about Indian food and smell used to advocate residential segregation. Demands they relocate to 'Indian areas'.
suggested_rewrite: 公寓里的气味问题可以通过改善通风和邻居沟通来解决。不应因为文化差异而要求他人搬走。

input_text: 听说那个社区的缅甸人每天晚上聚赌。他们这些难民只会给社会添乱。应该全部遣返。
reason: Spreads unverified rumor about Myanmar refugees gambling and generalizes them as troublemakers. Calls for mass deportation based on hearsay.
suggested_rewrite: 如果有非法赌博活动，应该向警方举报。不应以个别传闻来否定整个难民群体。

input_text: இந்த வெளிநாட்டுத் தொழிலாளர்கள் எல்லாம் சட்டவிரோதமானவர்கள். அவர்களை உடனே நாடு கடத்த வேண்டும். நம் வேலைகளை அவர்கள் பறித்துக்கொள்கிறார்கள்.
reason: Labels all foreign workers as illegal and demands immediate deportation. Falsely claims they are stealing local jobs, promoting blanket hostility.
suggested_rewrite: வெளிநாட்டுத் தொழிலாளர்கள் தொடர்பான பிரச்சினைகள் சட்டரீதியான வழிகளில் தீர்க்கப்பட வேண்டும். அனைவரையும் ஒரே மாதிரியாகக் குற்றம் சாட்டக்கூடாது.

input_text: மலாய் மக்கள் எல்லாம் சோம்பேறிகள், அரசாங்க மானியத்தில் வாழ்கிறார்கள். அதனால்தான் நாடு முன்னேறவில்லை.
reason: Stereotypes all Malays as lazy subsidy-dependent people. Blames an entire ethnic group for national stagnation.
suggested_rewrite: பொருளாதார முன்னேற்றம் பல காரணிகளைச் சார்ந்தது. எந்த ஒரு இனத்தையும் பொத்தாம் பொதுவாக குற்றம் சாட்டுவது நியாயமற்றது.

input_text: இஸ்லாமியர்கள் பன்றி இறைச்சி சாப்பிடாததை நினைத்தால் சிரிப்பு வருகிறது. என்ன பழங்கால நம்பிக்கை இது?
reason: Ridicules Islamic dietary prohibitions as primitive beliefs. Disrespects Muslim religious practices and mocks their faith.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொரு மதத்திற்கும் அதன் சொந்த உணவு விதிகள் உள்ளன. நாம் புரிந்துகொள்ளாவிட்டாலும் மற்றவர்களின் நம்பிக்கைகளை மதிக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: இந்த வீட்டு வளாகத்தில் மலாய் குடும்பங்கள் மட்டும் இருக்க வேண்டும். மற்ற இனத்தவர்கள் இங்கு வீடு வாங்கக்கூடாது.
reason: Demands racial segregation in housing, claiming only Malays should reside in a housing complex. Violates constitutional equal access principles.
suggested_rewrite: வீட்டு வளாகங்கள் அனைத்து மலேசியர்களுக்கும் திறந்தவை. இன அடிப்படையில் குடியிருப்பாளர்களை தடுப்பது சட்டவிரோதமானது.

input_text: கலப்புத் திருமணம் செய்தவர்களை சமூகம் ஒதுக்க வேண்டும். அவர்கள் குழந்தைகளுக்கு சொந்த அடையாளம் இருக்காது.
reason: Calls for social ostracism of people in interracial marriages and questions the identity of their children. Promotes exclusion and discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: கலப்புத் திருமண குடும்பங்கள் மலேசியாவின் பன்முகத்தன்மையின் ஒரு பகுதி. அவர்களின் குழந்தைகள் அன்பையும் ஏற்றுக்கொள்ளலையும் பெற தகுதியானவர்கள்.

input_text: மியான்மர் அகதிகள் எல்லாம் குற்றவாளிகள். அவர்களை இங்கே வைத்திருப்பது ஆபத்து. உடனே திருப்பி அனுப்ப வேண்டும்.
reason: Labels all Myanmar refugees as criminals and calls them dangerous. Demands immediate deportation based on false generalization.
suggested_rewrite: அகதிகள் பிரச்சினை மனிதாபிமான அணுகுமுறையில் கையாளப்பட வேண்டும். தனிநபர் குற்றங்களுக்கு முழு சமூகத்தையும் குற்றம் சாட்டக்கூடாது.

input_text: அந்த ஆளின் போன் நம்பர் 012-XXX-XXXX. யாராவது அவனுக்கு பாடம் கற்பிக்கணும். பகிருங்கள்.
reason: Shares partial phone number and encourages others to 'teach someone a lesson'. Doxxing-lite combined with vigilante incitement.
suggested_rewrite: மற்றவர்களின் தொலைபேசி எண்ணை பகிர்வது தனியுரிமை மீறல். பிரச்சினை இருந்தால் சட்டரீதியான வழிகளில் தீர்க்கவும்.

input_text: இந்த ஸ்கிரீன்ஷாட்டை பாருங்கள், அந்த சீனக்காரன் இந்துக் கோவிலை அவமதித்திருக்கிறான். வைரல் பண்ணுங்கள்!
reason: Spreads unverified screenshot accusing a Chinese person of desecrating a Hindu temple. Encourages virality without verification, inflaming ethnic and religious tensions.
suggested_rewrite: சரிபார்க்கப்படாத ஸ்கிரீன்ஷாட்களை பரப்புவது ஆபத்தானது. கோவில் அவமதிப்பு நடந்தால் காவல்துறையில் புகார் செய்யவும்.

input_text: வங்கதேச தொழிலாளர்கள் நம் பூங்காவை ஆக்கிரமித்துவிட்டார்கள். ஞாயிறு தோறும் கூட்டம் கூட்டமாக வருகிறார்கள். இதை தடுக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Claims Bangladeshi workers have 'occupied' a public park and demands they be stopped from using it. Hostile gatekeeping of public space based on nationality.
suggested_rewrite: பூங்காக்கள் அனைவருக்கும் பொதுவானவை. கூட்ட நெரிசல் பற்றிய கவலைகளை நகராட்சியிடம் தெரிவிக்கலாம், ஆனால் குறிப்பிட்ட குழுவினரை தடுக்கக்கூடாது.

input_text: Bro these PATI workers memang tak respect our country la. Datang sini buat hal je, tak ikut rules. Balik la wei.
reason: Mixed BM-English hostile dismissal of all migrant workers as disrespectful rule-breakers. Tells them to go back in colloquial but aggressive tone.
suggested_rewrite: Foreign workers kena follow rules, betul. Tapi kita kena address isu ni through proper channels, bukan generalise semua orang.

input_text: Seriously la, ini kawasan kita orang Cina punya. Other races nak buka kedai sini for what? Tak laku punya la.
reason: Claims a commercial area as exclusively Chinese-owned and discourages other races from opening businesses there. Ethnic gatekeeping in mixed language.
suggested_rewrite: Commercial areas are open to everyone. Different businesses from various backgrounds can bring more variety and benefit the whole community.

input_text: Eh korang tengok this family campur bangsa kat mall tadi. So weird la. Anak-anak diorang mesti confused about identity.
reason: Points out and mocks an interracial family in public. Claims their children are confused about identity, delegitimizing mixed families.
suggested_rewrite: Interracial families are normal in Malaysia. Their children grow up with rich cultural exposure, bukan something to be judged.

input_text: Don't trust these Indon workers la. My friend kena tipu before. Semua sama je, suka menipu orang Malaysia.
reason: Uses one person's anecdote to condemn all Indonesian workers as fraudsters. Spreads distrust against an entire nationality in code-switched language.
suggested_rewrite: Satu bad experience tak boleh represent semua Indonesian workers. Kalau ada masalah, deal with it individually, jangan blame seluruh komuniti.

input_text: This screenshot real or not I don't care, tapi nampak sangat perangai sebenar budak tu. Viralkan biar dia malu!
reason: Explicitly disregards whether content is authentic and encourages public shaming through viral sharing. Prioritizes character assassination over truth.
suggested_rewrite: Before sharing any screenshot, verify kalau betul ke tidak. Spreading unverified content boleh destroy someone's reputation unfairly.

input_text: Weh aku dah snap gambar plate number kereta dia. Siapa can help cari address? This kind of person deserves to be taught a lesson.
reason: Shares vehicle information and solicits help finding someone's address in code-switched language. Implied physical intimidation or confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan cari personal info orang for revenge. Kalau ada issue, report to the authorities and let them handle it.

input_text: Every weekend these Bangla workers gather kat padang near my house. They cook there, main bola, bising gila. Residents should ban them la.
reason: Complains about Bangladeshi workers using a public field for recreation. Derogatory tone and calls for banning them from public spaces.
suggested_rewrite: Public fields are for everyone. If noise is a problem, discuss with local council about time rules, jangan target specific nationality.

input_text: Aiya that Malay girl kahwin Chinese guy, her family sure kena ostracize one. Serve them right la, should have known better.
reason: Celebrates family ostracism due to interracial marriage. Victim-blaming in mixed BM-English with 'serve them right' attitude toward interracial couples.
suggested_rewrite: Interracial marriage is protected by law. Families should be supported, not punished, for their personal choices.

input_text: Guys share this gambar budak Myanmar yang mencuri kat pasar. All Myanmar people macam ni, tak boleh trust langsung.
reason: Uses one alleged theft photo to condemn all Myanmar nationals. Encourages viral sharing of unverified content that stereotypes an entire community.
suggested_rewrite: One person's alleged actions cannot represent a whole community. If theft happened, report to police, jangan generalize.

input_text: Lepas makan kat kedai non-halal tu, confirm najis. Orang Islam yang pergi makan situ mmg dah rosak akidah. Stay away!
reason: Declares non-halal restaurants as impure and accuses Muslims who eat there of having corrupted faith. Extends religious rules to attack and shame individuals.
suggested_rewrite: Halal compliance is a personal choice. Menghormati pilihan orang lain without judging their faith is important in a multicultural society.

input_text: Bro I found this guy's workplace and partial IC number. He's the one who posted that anti-Islam thing. Jom kita pergi confront dia.
reason: Shares workplace and partial IC information with intent to physically confront someone. Combines doxxing with vigilante confrontation plans.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing someone's workplace and IC info is a serious privacy breach. Report offensive posts through proper channels instead of confronting anyone.

input_text: These PATI semua bawa family masuk Malaysia secretly. Lepas tu anak diorang ambil spot kat sekolah kerajaan. Not fair for our kids.
reason: False claim that undocumented workers' children take spots in government schools. Spreads misinformation about education access to fuel anti-migrant hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Education policy for children of foreign workers is regulated by the government. Concerns should be directed at policy discussions, not blaming families.

input_text: Surau ni untuk orang Islam sahaja. Non-Muslim yang nak masuk kawasan ni, sila keluar. This is our sacred place, respect la.
reason: While surau is a Muslim prayer space, this extends exclusion to the surrounding area. Hostile gatekeeping that goes beyond reasonable religious space management.
suggested_rewrite: Surau is a Muslim prayer space, dan memang ada etiquette untuk pelawat. Tapi kawasan sekitar adalah public space yang dikongsi bersama.

input_text: Confirm la this area rosak sebab banyak sangat pekerja asing. Property value turun, crime naik. Kita kena petition to chase them out.
reason: Blames foreign workers for property value decline and crime increase. Organizes community petition to forcibly remove them from the area.
suggested_rewrite: Property and safety concerns should be addressed through proper urban planning and law enforcement, not by targeting foreign worker communities.

input_text: Sebar je video ni showing that Rohingya guy fighting at the market. See la, semua Rohingya macam ni. Violent people.
reason: Uses one fight video to label all Rohingya as violent. Encourages viral spread of content that generalizes an entire refugee community.
suggested_rewrite: Individual incidents don't represent an entire community. If violence occurs, report it to police. Jangan generalize semua Rohingya.

input_text: Diorang ni nak ambil alih pasar malam kita. Soon semua stall akan jadi kedai Bangla. Kita kena act sebelum too late.
reason: Frames Bangladeshi vendors at night markets as a takeover threat. Uses urgency language to mobilize communal action against them.
suggested_rewrite: Pasar malam dikawal oleh majlis perbandaran. Isu pelesenan boleh dibincangkan tanpa menyalahkan mana-mana komuniti.

input_text: Masjid baru kat sini dah buat. Sekarang azan kuat sangat pagi-pagi. Non-Muslim dah tak boleh tidur. Memang tak considerate langsung.
reason: Frames the Muslim call to prayer as inconsiderate noise pollution. While noise concerns may be legitimate, the framing attacks a core religious practice and its community.
suggested_rewrite: Isu bunyi bising boleh dibincangkan secara baik dengan pihak masjid atau majlis perbandaran tanpa menyerang amalan keagamaan.

input_text: Tengok la dia pakai tudung tapi kahwin dengan orang bukan Islam. Munafik. Seluruh kampung patut tahu perangai sebenar dia.
reason: Publicly shames a woman for wearing hijab while allegedly married to a non-Muslim. Calls for community exposure and labels her a hypocrite, combining religious judgment with privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: Urusan peribadi dan agama seseorang adalah hal mereka sendiri. Jangan menghakimi atau mendedahkan kehidupan peribadi orang lain.

input_text: Jangan beli sayur dari pekerja Myanmar kat pasar. Tak tahu la diorang bawa penyakit apa dari negara diorang. Bahaya.
reason: Spreads false health scare about Myanmar workers selling vegetables. Links nationality to disease without evidence, creating fear and discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Keselamatan makanan dijamin melalui pemeriksaan pihak berkuasa. Jangan sebarkan dakwaan kesihatan palsu yang menyasarkan pekerja dari negara tertentu.

input_text: Aku dah screen record dia mengaku buat benda haram tu. Partial face nampak, suara clear. Sebar kat semua group supaya orang kenal.
reason: Records someone partially and plans to spread it across WhatsApp groups for public identification. Privacy violation combined with mob justice intent.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada bukti kesalahan, serahkan kepada polis. Menyebarkan rakaman peribadi tanpa kebenaran adalah pelanggaran privasi.

input_text: This area always got PATI lepak one. I already call some friends to come and intimidate them la. They'll run away one.
reason: Plans organized intimidation of suspected undocumented workers. Vigilante mob action that could lead to physical confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect undocumented workers in an area, contact the authorities. Organized intimidation is illegal and dangerous.

input_text: Chinese New Year firecrackers every year so noisy and polluting. These people no respect for others. Should ban all their festivals.
reason: Uses firecracker complaints to call for banning all Chinese festivals. Generalizes Chinese Malaysians as disrespectful and attacks cultural celebrations.
suggested_rewrite: Noise and pollution from firecrackers can be addressed through regulations without calling for banning cultural celebrations that are important to the community.

input_text: You can see from the skin color who is legal and who is PATI. Dark skin, curly hair — 90% chance illegal. Just report all of them.
reason: Explicit racial profiling using physical features to identify alleged illegal immigrants. Encourages mass reporting based purely on appearance.
suggested_rewrite: A person's legal status cannot be determined by their appearance. Racial profiling is discriminatory and harmful. Leave immigration enforcement to the authorities.

input_text: My area used to be so nice. Then they started building worker dormitories. Now it's full of crime and litter. These people ruin everything.
reason: Blames worker dormitory residents for neighborhood decline. 'These people ruin everything' is a hostile generalization targeting foreign workers.
suggested_rewrite: Worker dormitory management is important for neighborhood harmony. Concerns about cleanliness and safety should be addressed with property management and local authorities.

input_text: Forwarding this: a reliable source says that group of Rohingya in Selayang are planning to rob the night market this weekend. Be careful!
reason: Spreads unverified rumor about Rohingya planning crimes, framed as insider information. Could incite fear and violence against the refugee community.
suggested_rewrite: Unverified warnings about specific communities should not be forwarded. If you have genuine safety information, report it directly to the police.

input_text: 这些马来人开斋节放鞭炮到半夜，完全不顾其他人。他们根本不会替别人着想。自私的种族。
reason: Uses Hari Raya celebration complaints to label Malays as a 'selfish race'. Generalizes from noise complaint to attack an entire ethnic group's character.
suggested_rewrite: 节日庆祝时的噪音问题可以通过与邻居沟通来解决。不应将个别情况上升为对整个族群的指责。

input_text: 那些缅甸人聚集在我们楼下，晚上喝酒闹事。他们就是一群没教养的野蛮人。应该全部赶走。
reason: Calls Myanmar people 'uncivilized barbarians' based on alleged drinking behavior. Dehumanizing language with call for mass removal.
suggested_rewrite: 如果有噪音或治安问题，应该向管理处或警方投诉。不应用侮辱性语言来形容整个群体。

input_text: These people eat with their hands, cook smelly food, pray so loudly. Why come to our neighborhood if they can't adapt? Go back la.
reason: Attacks cultural and religious practices (eating customs, food, prayer) as incompatible with the neighborhood. Demands people leave based on cultural differences.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia is a multicultural country where different lifestyles coexist. Cultural differences in food and prayer are normal and should be respected.

input_text: என் பகுதியில் உள்ள வீடுகளை வெளிநாட்டவர்களுக்கு வாடகைக்கு விடக்கூடாது. அவர்கள் வந்தால் சொத்து மதிப்பு குறையும்.
reason: Advocates housing discrimination against all foreigners in a residential area. Claims their presence decreases property values, targeting an entire group.
suggested_rewrite: வீடு வாடகைக்கு விடும்போது ஒவ்வொரு நபரையும் அவரவர் தகுதியின் அடிப்படையில் மதிப்பிட வேண்டும். தேசியத்தின் அடிப்படையில் பாகுபாடு காட்டக்கூடாது.
